prompt: Add a subtle layer of magical mist or fog clinging to the ground and around the floating islands, giving the environment a mysterious and enchanted feel.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Introduce a subtle, ethereal layer of magical mist or fog. This mist should cling to the base of all ground elements and the underside/surrounding areas of the floating islands and moss-covered logs depicted. The overall effect should imbue the scene with a mysterious and enchanted atmosphere.
